esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-cockroachdb.otel-default*
| WHERE service.name == "cockroachdb"
  AND admission_io_overload IS NOT NULL
  AND admission_io_overload > 1.0
// Values > 1.0 indicate storage overload; adjust threshold if needed
| WHERE attributes.node_id IS NOT NULL AND attributes.store IS NOT NULL
| STATS overload = MAX(admission_io_overload) BY attributes.node_id, attributes.store, host.name
| SORT overload DESC
